literal_meaning: placing together or bringing into composure
definition: A state of mental composure in which the mind is steady and well coordinated.
notes: Composure reflects steadiness and collectedness without implying forced concentration. This choice now extends into related compounds such as sammā-samādhi, where the project likewise prefers right composure over right concentration.

context_rules.context: In prose emphasizing the gathered quality of mind
context_rules.notes: Acceptable alternate when it reads more naturally.
